title: Rubat
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Rubat.png|thumb|right|Rubat crystals]]
'''Rubat''' was a variant of lightsaber [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] used in the construction of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. The planet [[Phemis]] was the only known source of rubat.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

When placed in a lightsaber's crystal chamber, rubat sharpened the appearance and definition of the blade,<ref name="TCSWE" /> allowing its wielder to easily track the blade and strike opponents properly. The crystal would also help its wielder attack faster.

The use of rubats was controlled by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], and later the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] exclusively used rubats before switching to [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystals]] from [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]].<ref name="Hidden Depths">{{FFG|story=Hidden Depths|book=Star Wars: Force and Destiny Game Master's Kit|text=''Force and Destiny'': Game Master's Kit}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
This [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] is used in ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' and slightly increases [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] damage.

In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', it provides a +1 to attack modifier and a +1 to lightsaber damage
